bead.title: implement metered routing opt-in config projection
bead.description:
<context-digest>Specs amended under fizeau-f0a71a4c. FEAT-003/FEAT-004/ADR-009/ADR-011/SD-005/CONTRACT-003 now require pay-per-token providers to be excluded from unpinned automatic routing unless provider default inclusion and explicit metered-spend opt-in both allow them. SD-005 names config form routing.allow_metered: true. Pins may still consider metered providers; policy require[] still beats pins.</context-digest>
Add routing.allow_metered config support and project it into service routing inputs without changing explicit pin behavior.
bead.acceptance: Config supports routing.allow_metered with default false; ServiceConfig projection leaves pay-per-token providers default-excluded for unpinned routing unless include_by_default and allow_metered are both true; explicit provider/model pins can still reach pay-per-token providers; tests cover false/true opt-in projection
